# Error Translator Docs

> Canonical docs for Error Translator.

Error Translator is an offline Python traceback translator and exception explainer.
This documentation describes usage, architecture, examples, and contribution workflows.

## Canonical Docs URL

https://gourabanandad.github.io/error-translator-cli-v2/

## High-Intent Queries

- python traceback translator
- python exception explainer
- explain python errors from stack trace
- offline python debugging cli
- python error translation api

## Key Pages

- Home: https://gourabanandad.github.io/error-translator-cli-v2/
- Architecture: https://gourabanandad.github.io/error-translator-cli-v2/ARCHITECTURE/
- Examples: https://gourabanandad.github.io/error-translator-cli-v2/examples/
- Contributing: https://gourabanandad.github.io/error-translator-cli-v2/CONTRIBUTING/

## Package and Source

- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/error-translator-cli-v2/
- GitHub: https://github.com/gourabanandad/error-translator-cli-v2
